app.name: Django REST Framework
app.one_liner: A powerful and customizable toolkit for building Web APIs with Django.

screens.name: Browsable API
screens.purpose: Allows developers to interact with and explore the API directly in the browser.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a new or updated model instance through a serializer.

mvp_plan: week 1: Set up Django project with DRF
acceptance_tests: Authentication policies are applied as configured.
The browsable API renders correctly for User endpoints.
UserSerializer correctly maps model fields to API representation.
